title: Peacekeepers killed by roadside explosion in Lebanon, initial report finds
summary_full: The deaths of the two Indonesian nationals came less than a day after another UN peacekeeper - also Indonesian - was killed in Lebanon.
summary_public: The deaths of the two Indonesian nationals came less than a day after another UN peacekeeper - also Indonesian - was killed in Lebanon.
